channel.title: Homelab on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Homelab on ExitCode0

item.title: Running Ollama in a Proxmox LXC with NVIDIA GPU Passthrough
item.description: A complete guide to setting up Ollama inside a Proxmox LXC container with full NVIDIA GPU passthrough, Tailscale access, and Open WebUI — run your own local LLMs with GPU acceleration.
